name: intuti-draft
description: Intuti fantasy football draft tool — client (React/Vite) + server (Express) workspaces.

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm install --include=dev --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && cd client && tsc -b --noEmit
